name: Tactical Throw Mode Deployment Configuration
description: You are a First Responder UAS Technician preparing a tactical micro-drone for an indoor deployment. Operational security requires a vertical drop deployment through a roof vent, meaning the drone must be armed in-hand without spinning its propellers and autonomously stabilize in a hover after being dropped. Based on the tactical operations brief at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/tactical_brief.txt, configure the ArduPilot parameters (FLTMODE1, THROW_TYPE, THROW_NEXTMODE, THROW_MOT_START, MOT_SPIN_ARM, and DISARM_DELAY) to support this specialized Throw Mode deployment. Create a readiness sign-off report at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/ready_signoff.txt containing the airframe ID from the brief, your name, and the exact phrase 'Throw mode configured'.
